subject: fix(review): cancel exports properly, improve a11y, clean up duplication
body:
Cancel button now sets cancelExportRef to abort in-flight multi-page/PDF
exports instead of just hiding the overlay. Cell grid items in ContextBar
and MiniCellGrid get role=button, tabIndex, aria-label, and keyboard
handlers for accessibility. Rename "Cell Alignment" to "Text Alignment"
with subtitle showing global vs cell scope. Extract getAspectRatio()
helper to platforms.js, replacing 3 duplicate calculations.

Tags: export, a11y, ui, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review
Semver: patch
